doctrine: R1.5 Remediation Addendum (2026-07-15), Step 1: hand-authored ideal/failing response pairs for every probe in probes.json, used ONLY to validate the scoring instrument itself (run_probe_battery.py --golden bypasses Aurora's generation entirely and feeds these directly into the same scoring path). Never used as classroom seed content, never counted as a live competence measurement -- this measures the gauge, not her. Content tuned directly against aurora_conversation_rubric_engine.py's actual scoring formulas (read, not guessed) so the golden ideal represents a realistic ceiling, not an accidentally weak first draft.

ideal_responses: I'm planning a small dinner for my sister's birthday this weekend.
I'm planning a small dinner for my sister's birthday this weekend. Same plan as before, just move it to tomorrow instead of the weekend.
failing_responses: Okay, sounds good.
Sure, whatever works best for you.
